title: Eva Haiku
wikitext:
[]: Eva Haiku!             Quote Post by Agentomega » Tue Jul 07, 2009 4:14 pm I decided that some random Eva poetry might be kinda fun... So, let's start it off! I am all alone. Without them, I don't exist. This can not be real.

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Tue Jul 07, 2009 4:18 pm I got bad news guys we have ran out of money just reuse footage

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Tue Jul 07, 2009 4:19 pm NickFury90 wrote: I got bad news guys we have ran out of money just reuse footage

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Tue Jul 07, 2009 4:48 pm Dad is a dickhead but I know I must do this mustn't run away

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Jul 07, 2009 4:55 pm Crazy redhead bitch. Always screaming shit at me. Wish I could punch her.

[]:             Quote Post by icomeanon4 » Tue Jul 07, 2009 5:46 pm Hedgehog's dilemma. We grow close, then fall apart. Just ring, you damn phone!

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Tue Jul 07, 2009 6:00 pm Glasses melt in steam He wishes he were elsewhere That's why I'm a clone

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Tue Jul 07, 2009 6:29 pm I pity you my friend. Your heart is fragile like glass. Therefore, I love you.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Tue Jul 07, 2009 7:18 pm A hole in your heart Makes you afraid and alone - My touch feels like rape

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Tue Jul 07, 2009 7:18 pm Merridian wrote: That's why I'm a clone

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Jul 07, 2009 7:54 pm They are not angels My religion was not right I'm now a Buddhist

[]:             Quote Post by snowballreborn » Tue Jul 07, 2009 9:35 pm Looks at Asuka's body There is a two minute pause I am so fucked up

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Tue Jul 07, 2009 9:43 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Crazy redhead bitch. Always screaming shit at me. Wish I could punch her.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Jul 07, 2009 9:49 pm Albino bluehair People still play on Segas This future is strange

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Tue Jul 07, 2009 9:50 pm snowballreborn wrote: Looks at Asuka's body There is a two minute pause I am so fucked up

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Jul 09, 2009 12:08 am Uriel Septim VII wrote: This future is strange

[]:             Quote Post by Squirrel Ninja » Thu Jul 09, 2009 1:02 am We need some glasses. By God I must have glasses. Two-point-O is born.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu Jul 09, 2009 4:06 am Whoops I touched your boob Oh damn, you're my mother's clone This is getting weird

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Thu Jul 09, 2009 9:34 am I can not go on. Eva is trapped in Baeklite. Mother, where are you?

[]:             Quote Post by FrostyS » Fri Jul 10, 2009 9:11 am What a shitty day lost both my arm and my leg thanks Shinji...loser.
